public_reputation: Known around Shelkopolis through day-to-day work as shrine attendant.
manner: Protects small rituals with quiet firmness and notices subtle breaches long before they become public offense. In Shelkopolis, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of shrine attendant in and around Shelkopolis, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Shelkopolis workable through the obligations of shrine attendant while managing the immediate pressure of glyph corruption beyond the city, trade security obligations, noble rivalry.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of shrine attendant credible while absorbing the strain created by glyph corruption beyond the city, trade security obligations, noble rivalry.

adventure_hooks.summary: Elyra Velvetmere can draw the party into a locality problem centered on shrine attendant duties in Shelkopolis.
Elyra Velvetmere becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with glyph corruption beyond the city, trade security obligations, noble rivalry around Shelkopolis.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Elyra Velvetmere is immediately readable as a shrine attendant tied to Shelkopolis.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Shelkopolis: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Elyra Velvetmere presents as someone shaped by the duties of a shrine attendant and the daily pressures of Shelkopolis.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a shrine attendant, and proof that strangers will not make Shelkopolis harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Elyra Velvetmere refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a shrine attendant too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can identify offerings, taboos, and recent signs of ritual irregularity.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Elyra Velvetmere adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Elyra Velvetmere always knows more about Shelkopolis than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a shrine attendant in Shelkopolis.
